items.title: Summer Hawks beats Brooklyn 83-76 despite a very meh evening from lotto pick Kingston Flemings. Good minutes from Zuby Ejiofor, a poster dunk from Henri Veesaar and some solid play from the G Leaguers.
items.author: John Hollinger
items.body_excerpt:
Summer Hawks beats Brooklyn 83-76 despite a very meh evening from lotto pick Kingston Flemings. Good minutes from Zuby Ejiofor, a poster dunk from Henri Veesaar and some solid play from the G Leaguers. 

Nets shot 2-of-24 from 3. YIKES!!

items.title: Hard to describe how bad the Hawks have been any time Flemings leaves the court.
items.author: Brad Rowland
items.body_excerpt:
Hard to describe how bad the Hawks have been any time Flemings leaves the court.

But one way to do it would be to note that Atlanta is +1 with him and -18 without him in the first half.

items.author: Brad Rowland
items.body_excerpt:
The Hawks trailed 6-5 when Kingston Flemings went to the bench for the first time.

They trail 23-11 at the end of the first quarter.

Kingston Flemings good -- helped forced the Darryn Peterson turnover, hit the jumper with Hawks down 3

Kingston Flemings unfortunate -- the foot was on the line

items.title: Kingston Flemings good: 8 assists, 1 turnover, 2/5 3s
items.author: Law Murray 📘
items.body_excerpt:
Kingston Flemings good: 8 assists, 1 turnover, 2/5 3s

Kingston Flemings not so good: 1/10 FGs inside arc

items.title: 5 points, 2 assists, and a steal in the first 2 minutes of the second half for Flemings.
items.author: Brad Rowland
items.body_excerpt: 5 points, 2 assists, and a steal in the first 2 minutes of the second half for Flemings.

items.title: Flemings opened the second half getting to a mid-range pull-up on the first possession.
items.author: Brad Rowland
items.body_excerpt:
Flemings opened the second half getting to a mid-range pull-up on the first possession.

Then he drew a shooting foul in transition on the second possession.

items.title: Kingston Flemings didn't shoot well in the first half.
items.author: Brad Rowland
items.body_excerpt:
Kingston Flemings didn't shoot well in the first half. 

He also did some very encouraging things. 

Broke the paint consistently. 

5 assists, 0 turnovers. 

And got up 3 threes in 12 minutes.

(defense has a long way to go, but that's the baseline for a 19-year-old guard)

items.title: Rough scoring half for Kingston Flemings (3 points, 1/7 FGs)
items.author: Law Murray 📘
items.body_excerpt:
Rough scoring half for Kingston Flemings (3 points, 1/7 FGs)

But he did have five assists without a turnover

Rough playmaking half for Darryn Peterson (no assists, 3 turnovers)

But he's been aggressive as a scorer (10 points, two and-ones)

items.title: Flemings has had 2 or 3 very good skip passes already.
items.author: Brad Rowland
items.body_excerpt:
Flemings has had 2 or 3 very good skip passes already.

3 assists in 6 minutes overall.

items.title: Of note, Kingston Flemings projects to make about $7.35 million in Year 1 of his rookie-scale contract.
items.author: Brad Rowland
items.body_excerpt:
Of note, Kingston Flemings projects to make about $7.35 million in Year 1 of his rookie-scale contract. 

Zuby Ejiofor projects at about $3.45 million in Year 1.

So slightly less than $11 million total to add to the Hawks cap sheet, which was already the expectation.

items.title: Lawrence Frank said that Keaton Wagler missed a lot of his shots during a shooting drill they had him do, but then the scrimmage started. “And then he made every shot and made all the winning plays,” highlighted Frank. Frank mentioned Kingston Flemings also worked out.

items.body_excerpt: Lawrence Frank said that Keaton Wagler missed a lot of his shots during a shooting drill they had him do, but then the scrimmage started. “And then he made every shot and made all the winning plays,” highlighted Frank. Frank mentioned Kingston Flemings also worked out.

items.title: Onsi Saleh on Flemings and Ejiofor: "We felt like we got two guys that just made a lot of sense for our program. They fit everything that we are about. They fit everything about what we want to do moving forward.... We took the two best players available on our board, too."

Kingston Flemings was the highest-rated player on my board and the Hawks apparently agree.

Talented point guard from Houston who is a big-time athlete, potentially versatile scorer, and high-level operator.

Also has impeccable off-court intel by all accounts.

media.title: NBA Draft Prospects on Black Fatherhood | 2026 NBA Draft Preview | Andscape
media.description: Marc J. Spears sits down with top 2026 NBA Draft prospects and their fathers for a Father's Day conversation about presence, trust and the lessons that shape the next generation. AJ Dybantsa, Cam Boozer, Mikel Brown Jr., Kingston Flemings and Darius Acuff Jr. reflect on family, NIL, discipline, faith and what it means to have fathers guiding them from youth basketball toward the NBA stage.  Subscribe to Andscape for more sports culture documentaries, athlete stories, interviews, and original features exploring the intersection of sports, Black culture, and community.  #Andscape #SportsCulture #BlackCulture #NBADraft #NBADraftPreview #FathersDay #BlackFatherhood #AJDybantsa #CamBoozer #DariusAcuffJrVISIT  OUR WEBSITE: http://andscape.com SUBSCRIBE TO ANDSCAPE’S YOUTUBE: https://www.youtube.com/@Andscape_  FOLLOW US ON SOCIAL Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/andscape/ TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@andscape X: https://www.twitter.com/andscape  Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/Andscape  ABOUT ANDSCAPE Andscape is a Black-led media platform dedicated to creating, highlighting, and uplifting the diverse stories of Black identity. Magnified by the power and reach of The Walt Disney Co., the Andscape umbrella includes an editorial division, book publishing arm, film and television division, and music publishing group, each united by the shared mission of illuminating the culture and experience of Blackness. Founded in 2022, Andscape is a reimagination, expansion and diversification of The Undefeated’s former platform.
